_note: Canonical registry of finding category codes. Source of truth for scoring.md, output-format.md, and all review agents. When adding a new category, update this registry first.

SEC-SECRET.description: Secret or credential detected in source code or pipeline artifact

SEC-PII.description: Potential PII detected (email, phone — verify manually)

SEC-AGENT-INPUT.description: Agent input handling vulnerability (injection, parameter abuse)

SEC-AGENT-CASCADE.description: Agent cascading failure risk (missing isolation, unbounded propagation)

PERF.description: Backend performance issue (N+1, O(n^2), blocking I/O)

FE-PERF.description: Frontend performance issue (re-renders, bundle size, DOM)

TEST.description: Test quality issue (coverage, mocks, assertions, isolation)

TEST-MUTATION-SURVIVE.description: Mutant survived — test gap for this code path

TEST-MUTATION-TIMEOUT.description: Mutant caused test timeout (likely meaningful mutation)

TEST-MUTATION-EQUIVALENT.description: Mutant is functionally equivalent (no behavior change)

DOC.description: Documentation gap (missing docs, stale sections, cross-ref conflicts)

QUAL.description: Code quality (complexity, duplication, dead code, error handling)

QUAL-ERR.description: Error handling quality (swallowed exceptions, missing error paths)

QUAL-COMPLEX.description: Code complexity (deep nesting, large functions, high cyclomatic)

SCOUT.description: Boy Scout improvement (tracked, no point deduction)

A11Y.description: Accessibility violation (WCAG, keyboard nav, screen reader, ARIA)

DEP.description: Dependency health (vulnerable, unmaintained, outdated, conflicts, license)

STRUCT.description: Project structure violation (file placement, naming, boundaries)

REVIEW-GAP.description: Coverage gap from timed-out or failed review agent

DESIGN-TOKEN.description: Frontend design token violation (hardcoded hex/rgb instead of theme tokens)

DESIGN-MOTION.description: Frontend animation performance issue (non-GPU properties, missing will-change)

FE-VISUAL-REGRESSION.description: Unexpected visual change detected (layout shift, element missing)

FE-VISUAL-RESPONSIVE.description: Layout breaks at specific viewport breakpoint

FE-VISUAL-CONTRAST.description: Text contrast ratio below WCAG AA threshold

FE-VISUAL-FIDELITY.description: Visual output deviates from design specification

TEST-QUARANTINE.description: Test quarantine status changed (quarantined or unquarantined)

SEC-MCP-UNAUTHORIZED.description: Unapproved MCP server detected — blocked by governance allowlist

SEC-SUPPLY-LOWPOP.description: Dependency has very low download count (potential low-trust package)

SEC-ENTROPY.description: High-entropy string detected — potential obfuscated secret

SEC-CLOUD-CRED.description: Cloud provider credential detected (AWS, GCP, Azure, GitHub, Slack, Stripe)

SEC-CACHE-TAMPER.description: Cached artifact integrity check failed (SHA256 mismatch)

SPEC-DRIFT.description: Specification drift detected (implementation deviates from spec)

SPEC-DRIFT-COVERAGE-GAP.description: Acceptance criterion exists but no test covers it

SPEC-DRIFT-VIOLATION.description: Test exists for acceptance criterion but fails

SPEC-DRIFT-UNDOCUMENTED.description: Implementation adds behavior not captured in any acceptance criterion

SPEC-DRIFT-UNIMPLEMENTED.description: Acceptance criterion has no corresponding implementation

A11Y-KEYBOARD.description: Keyboard navigation issue (tab order, focus trap, keyboard-only interaction)

A11Y-FOCUS.description: Focus visibility issue (missing or insufficient focus indicator)

A11Y-ARIA.description: ARIA attribute completeness issue (missing or incorrect ARIA)

I18N-HARDCODED.description: Hard-coded user-facing string not using i18n framework

I18N-MISSING-KEY.description: Translation key present in source locale but missing in target locale

I18N-RTL.description: Hardcoded left/right in CSS instead of logical start/end properties

I18N-FORMAT.description: Hardcoded date/number format instead of locale-aware Intl API

PERF-REGRESSION.description: Performance regression detected across pipeline runs

PERF-REGRESSION-BUILD.description: Build time regression exceeding configured threshold

PERF-REGRESSION-TEST.description: Test suite duration regression exceeding configured threshold

PERF-REGRESSION-BUNDLE.description: Bundle/artifact size regression exceeding configured threshold

PERF-REGRESSION-CUSTOM.description: Custom performance metric regression exceeding configured threshold

SPEC-INFERENCE-LOW.description: Low-confidence specification inferred — may be inaccurate

SPEC-INFERENCE-CONFLICT.description: Specification evidence sources contradict each other

TEST-PROPERTY-INVARIANT.description: Invariant property failed — postcondition violation for all valid inputs

TEST-PROPERTY-IDEMPOTENT.description: Idempotence property failed — repeated application changes result

TEST-PROPERTY-METAMORPHIC.description: Metamorphic relation violated — input-output relationship broken

TEST-PROPERTY-COMMUTATIVE.description: Commutativity property failed — operation order affects result

TEST-PROPERTY-MONOTONIC.description: Monotonicity property failed — ordering not preserved

DEPLOY-HEALTH.description: Deployment health degradation detected (error rate spike, latency increase, pod crash)

DEPLOY-CANARY.description: Canary deployment progress or metric report

DEPLOY-STRATEGY.description: Deployment strategy configuration issue (missing metric endpoint, invalid step definition)

CONTRACT-PACT-FAIL.description: Pact provider verification failed — consumer expectation not met

CONTRACT-PACT-PENDING.description: Pending pact verification — consumer has published new expectations not yet verified

CONTRACT-PACT-MISSING.description: Expected pact file or broker entry not found for a configured consumer

ML-VERSION.description: Model versioning issue (unversioned model, missing metadata, LFS-absent binary)

ML-REPRO.description: Experiment reproducibility issue (unfixed seed, missing hyperparameters, unpinned deps)

ML-DATA.description: Data quality or governance issue (unvalidated schema, missing data tests, PII in dataset)

ML-PIPELINE.description: ML/data pipeline issue (untested DAG, non-idempotent task, missing retry config)

FLAG-STALE.description: Stale feature flag — flag fully rolled out but code branches still present

FLAG-UNTESTED.description: Feature-flagged code path without tests for both flag states

FLAG-HARDCODED.description: Hardcoded boolean toggle that should be a feature flag

FLAG-CLEANUP.description: Feature flag eligible for cleanup (fully rolled out, no rollback risk)
